subject: Update DCAE container versions
commit_message:
Update DCAE container versions

- k8s-bootstrap-container => 1.4.1
- cm-container => 1.4.0
- change bootstrap from Job to Deployment

Change-Id: I57fb0aaba1f7ef6d361049b88e755075faeae00f
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-594
Signed-off-by: Jack Lucas <jflucas@research.att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Tested in Wind River environment, Helm 2.9.1, deploying dcaegen along with a subset of the other ONAP components.  All Helm-deployed DCAE pods came up.  DCAE healthcheck passed.

====
jfl@orchtest:~/installs/k8s/oom/kubernetes$ kubectl -n onap get pod | grep dev-dcae
dev-dcae-bootstrap-8677b8945d-v29gc             1/1       Running            0          26m
dev-dcae-cloudify-manager-59d7cd9499-bchnj      1/1       Running            0          26m
dev-dcae-db-0                                   1/1       Running            0          27m
dev-dcae-db-1                                   1/1       Running            0          19m
dev-dcae-healthcheck-5cff64c4bc-qmlbd           1/1       Running            0          26m
dev-dcae-redis-0                                1/1       Running            0          27m
dev-dcae-redis-1                                1/1       Running            0          20m
dev-dcae-redis-2                                1/1       Running            0          15m
dev-dcae-redis-3                                1/1       Running            0          10m
dev-dcae-redis-4                                1/1       Running            0          7m
dev-dcae-redis-5                                1/1       Running            0          5m
